paper_threads.summary: Discussion of SAM 3.1 release from Meta AI introducing object multiplexing to improve video processing capabilities.
Paper on 'Self-Distillation of Hidden Layers for Self-Supervised Representation Learning' introducing Bootleg method.
New scientific multimodal foundation model 'Intern-S1-Pro' at trillion scale with accompanying research paper.
Research on sycophantic AI showing how it decreases prosocial intentions and promotes user dependence.
Study investigating how subliminal prompting propagates across networks of interacting AI agents.
Research on alignment issues showing how finetuning activates verbatim recall of copyrighted books in large language models.

announcements.summary: Nintendo Switch 2 available for $399/$439 Mario Kart Bundle on Woot with physical or digital game options.
Hermes Agent v0.5.0 release announcement from Nous Research with new features and improvements.
Death Stranding 2: On The Beach available for $29.99 on Best Buy Deal of the Day across multiple platforms.
Weekly Shonen Jump simulpub chapters now available including One Piece, Spy x Family, and other popular manga series.
PlayStation 5 Pro Console restocked at $749 across major retailers, with price increasing to $899 on Thursday.
NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE anime adaptation coming to Crunchyroll in April featuring OMGkawaiiAngel character.

discussions.summary: Thread discussing whether Gaussian splats should be considered 'AI' and the problems of using 'AI' to refer to heterogeneous technologies.
François Chollet explains intelligence as a conversion ratio with optimality bounds, arguing against the 'unbounded scalar stat' misconception.
Discussion of intelligence optimization and human science capability, comparing it to chess-like scenarios with alien species.
McMansion Hell author complaining about NYT repeatedly plagiarizing her work and architectural criticism approach.
Debate over whether local AI models are good enough compared to cloud models, with focus on privacy and freedom benefits.
Discussion of DeepSeek performance issues and potential implications for their model versions and capabilities.
